title: I built a trading journal that actually coaches you — 20% off until March 1st
author: Local-Amphibian9197
selftext:
Been trading forex and indices for a while and got tired of journals that just store data without helping you improve. So I built [TradingSFX ](http://www.tradingsfx.com)— an AI-powered trading journal focused on confluence tracking, performance analytics, and real coaching feedback on your trades.

Not trying to sell you a magic system. It's a tool to help you be more disciplined and consistent.

Use code **SFX20** for 20% off — valid until March 1st.

Happy to answer any questions about the app or the approach behind it.
